steps.title: Look for mixed feelings
steps.content: The claim says the speaker has contradictory feelings while experiencing a spring day. The quotation must show positive and negative feelings occurring together.

steps.title: Reject only pleasant images
steps.content: Choice A, Choice B, and Choice C all present pleasant observations of nature without sadness or inner conflict. The remaining quotation joins a sweet mood with sad thoughts, directly illustrating the contradiction. The answer is D.
